---
title: "Why Your Neighbor Matters: Positions in Preferential Trade Agreement Networks and Export Growth in Global Value Chains"
author: "Jong Hee Park and ByungKoo Kim"
date: "2020-09-01"
year: 2020
venue: "Economics & Politics, 32(3), 381--410"
url: "https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1111/ecpo.12152"
---
